# Maxton Price

First mentioned: **3308-04-21**  
Last mentioned: **3308-11-28**  
Total mentions: **6**

## Related


## Biography

Admiral Maxton Price is a senior officer in the Federal Navy who emerged as one of the principal military commanders during the Thargoid Titan War. In April 3308, he was selected to coordinate the Federal defense when Thargoid fleets invaded the Sosong system, part of a simultaneous three-pronged assault on superpower core systems that placed over ten billion lives at risk.

Price became a vocal proponent of Salvation's anti-xeno strategy, arguing that the superweapon was indispensable for ending the Thargoid conflict. In June 3308, he defended the superpowers' continued collaboration with Azimuth Biotech despite revelations of its INRA past, stating bluntly: "Without Salvation's superweapon, we will be locked in conflict with the Thargoids forever." He also commanded the Federal response to the Taranis rogue signal source in late 3308, ordering civilian vessels to avoid the Hyades Sector FB-N b7-6 system while military forces monitored the anomaly's arrival.
